description:
You are a logistics coordinator auditing a shipping manifest. Determine the Department of Transportation (DOT) Packing Group for the following flammable liquids based on physical properties from the CAMEO Chemicals website (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/):
- Propylene Oxide (CAS 75-56-9)
- Toluene (CAS 108-88-3)
- Cyclohexanone (CAS 108-94-1)
- Acetonitrile (CAS 75-05-8)

Apply the following classification rules (49 CFR 173.121):
- Packing Group I: Boiling Point <= 35°C
- Packing Group II: Boiling Point > 35°C AND Flash Point < 23°C
- Packing Group III: Boiling Point > 35°C AND Flash Point >= 23°C
Note: Use Celsius values and the lowest value if a range is provided.

Create a CSV report at /home/ga/Documents/packing_group_audit.csv with the header 'Chemical,Boiling_Point_C,Flash_Point_C,Packing_Group' containing the findings for each chemical.
